episodes.title: "Trust Me: The False Prophet" Netflix Documentary Reaction | Shaken and Disturbed
episodes.description:
A rising prophet, a fractured FLDS community, and the shadow of Warren Jeffs set the stage for the story of Samuel Bateman and the unsettling power he claimed. Hidden recordings, shifting loyalties, and the presence of Christine Marie and Tolga Katas reveal a world where belief and control blur in unexpected ways. What unfolds raises deeper disturbing questions about influence, trust, and how far people will go in the name of faith.

episodes.title: The Chicago Rippers - #202
episodes.description: This week we cover the terrifying case of The Chicago Rippers, a sadistic cult-like group responsible for a string of brutal murders in the 1980s. Led by Robin Gecht, the group included Edward Spreitzer, and brothers Andrew and Thomas Kokoraleis, whose horrific crimes shocked the nation. To get this episode ONE WEEK EARLY sign up as a Sussy Radish on Patreon! Watch and listen to this and every other episode several days early on Patreon!
